metadata.name: Concrete
metadata.title: Concrete Laser Cleaning Settings
metadata.description: Detailed machine settings, parameter relationships, diagnostic procedures, and troubleshooting guides for optimizing concrete laser cleaning operations.

author.name: Todd Dunning
author.title: MA
credentials: MA Optics and Photonics, UC Irvine, 2019
author.imageAlt: Todd Dunning, MA, Junior Optical Materials Specialist at Coherent Inc., with precision optics tools

powerRange.description: Optimal average power for concrete surface cleaning and contaminant removal

wavelength.description: Near-infrared wavelength optimized for concrete absorption and minimal substrate damage

spotSize.description: Beam spot diameter for effective cleaning coverage and energy density control

repetitionRate.description: Optimal repetition rate for continuous cleaning coverage without thermal buildup

energyDensity.description: Fluence threshold for effective contaminant removal while preserving concrete integrity

pulseWidth.description: Pulse duration balancing efficient contaminant removal with concrete substrate preservation

scanSpeed.description: Optimal scanning speed for uniform cleaning with sufficient energy deposition

passCount.description: Recommended number of passes for complete contaminant removal

overlapRatio.description: Optimal beam overlap percentage for uniform cleaning coverage
